This is off the jogging train, down in the trails South of the trail, so getting down in there is somewhat treacherous.  On the secondary trail, I found at least six poke plants of a size to produce berries (warning, not edible berries) in 2013 while hanging out there with some homeless people who were using the berries for ink.
Secondary trail south of the bike trail.  Steep hill into area where the plants are found, but the plants are quite healthy. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: April-September.
Small clump of persimmon trees on the hill to the north of the xpy. Access: Public.
